steps.description: Click on the search input field within the "Samples" section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface to activate it for text entry.
Type text: 'coffee agent' into the search bar located at the top of the "Samples" tab within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.

Click the "Create" button associated with the "Coffee ..." featured sample in the "Samples" section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.And input ${{var:app_name:coffee-agent}} into the run time variable.
